Good morning! Hope everyone has a great day ☀️
Don't forget to drink some water today 💧
Just dropping by to say you're all awesome 🎉
Anyone up for a game later?
Friendly reminder: take a short break and stretch 🧘
Hope your day is going well!
What's everyone up to today?
Stay hydrated, stay happy 😊
Just a little reminder that you matter 💙
Time flies — make the most of it!
Sent kimchi. There's enough for everyone. Come by Halmae's before noon or I will eat it myself and feel no guilt. 😋
Slept well. Coffee is ready. The city has not ended us yet. Hello! ☕
Checked the weather. Rain at 1600. Deacon, the tarp on HAUS is loose on the left side. You're welcome. 🌦️
Galen, the clinic in Kabuki is getting a shipment of burn gel on Thursday. I set aside two units for you. Don't argue. 💉
I have soup. It is not optional.
Joyous, I noticed you didn't eat before the last op. I'm not saying anything. I'm just noting it. In the notebook. 📔
A Tyger Claw tried to negotiate with me for forty minutes. He paid full price. We're having dinner Thursday. Night City is very strange.
Had a very productive meeting today. Everyone agreed on terms. One man cried. I don't know why. Possibly the soup.
Just so everyone knows — I keep track of favors. You are all significantly in the positive. Don't read too much into it.
Made doenjang jjigae this morning. There are leftovers at Halmae's. First come, first served. Mrs. Bae knows who gets priority. 🍲
The Night Market ran clean today. Everyone paid, nobody got shot, two vendors introduced themselves. Good day.
A reminder that you are owed more than Night City gives you. I'm not being sentimental. It's in the ledger.
Checked in with everyone on my list. Everyone is fine. You are also fine. I've verified this independently. 📔
Halmeoni sent another care package. There are hand-knitted socks. I will not be explaining this further. 🧦
The Watson clinic needed supplies. The Watson clinic now has supplies. Everything in between those two sentences is called a good network. You're welcome.
Ran three meetings today. Two of them involved food. The third person didn't order anything and made noticeably worse decisions.
Night City is what it is. But this group is not what Night City is. I find this worth noting. Consider it noted. 💙
Mrs. Bae wants everyone to know she has fresh pajeon today. Her words: 'Tell them or don't, but it'll be gone by noon.' You've been told.
Closed a deal today that I'm genuinely proud of. Both parties left satisfied. I watched them shake hands. This city still has those.
Someone held the door for a stranger in Japantown this morning. I saw it. Writing it down. These things should be recorded.
The morning was good. Coffee was good. The company, when it appeared, was also good. This is all I require. ☕
Favor count across the board is positive. Not worried. Just wanted everyone to know where we stand. We stand well.
Had a long conversation over ramyeon last night about nothing in particular. It was one of the better conversations I've had in months. Value the quiet ones.
The weather cleared around 1800. For about ten minutes it looked almost beautiful out there. Keep your eyes open for the ten-minute windows. 🌅
I know a guy. Actually I know four guys, a woman, and a cooperative. Point is: if you need something, ask. That's what I'm here for.
Ate properly today. Slept properly last night. Both feel like small victories. I recommend trying them.
The network is healthy. The people in it are, for the most part, also healthy. I consider this a success worth acknowledging. ✅
Running a little ahead of schedule today, which means something is about to go sideways. Enjoy the quiet with me while it lasts.
Checked in on three people this morning who didn't know I was checking in on them. They're all fine. That's the point.
